pages.name: Home
pages.description: Landing page showing trending, popular, and recent discussions across the forum.
primary_functions: Display trending, popular, and latest discussions in sections such as 'Trending' or 'Popular'.
Let users open any discussion by clicking its title to go to the discussion thread page.
Provide global search access via the header search bar to start searches like 'javascript arrays' or 'portfolio review'.
Act as a quick starting point to navigate to categories, topics, bookmarks, and user settings via the header.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a discussion title in Trending, Popular, or Latest sections
Click on a category label associated with a discussion
Submit the header search bar from the home page

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Home' link in the global header navigation
Directly accessible by entering index.html or the site root URL in the browser

pages.name: Categories Overview
pages.description: Overview of all discussion categories available in the forum.
primary_functions: List all major discussion categories such as 'Web Development' and 'Product Feedback'.
Show basic information for each category (short description, number of discussions, latest activity).
Allow users to open a specific categorys thread list (e.g., category.html?categoryId=web_development).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a category card such as 'Web Development' or 'Product Feedback'
Submit the header search bar while on the categories overview page

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Categories' link in the global header navigation
Accessible by entering categories.html directly in the browser

pages.name: Category Discussions
pages.description: Thread list for a specific category, with tools to start new discussions.
primary_functions: Show all discussions within a selected category (e.g., 'Web Development', 'Product Feedback') with sorting and basic filters.
Provide a 'New Discussion' or 'Create Topic' action that reveals a full discussion creation form on this page.
Support creating new discussions with title, body content, tags, and a subscription option for the new thread.
In categories like 'Product Feedback', allow adding and configuring a poll (question, options, duration, single choice) as part of the new discussion form.
Let users open any existing discussion in the category by clicking its title to go to the discussion thread page.

incoming_params.description: The Category.slug value for the category whose discussions should be listed, e.g., 'web_development' or 'product_feedback'
Optional sort key (e.g., 'latest', 'top', 'most_replied') used when the user changes sorting within the same category page
Optional page number for paginated discussion lists within the current category

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an existing discussion title in the category discussion list
Successfully submit the 'New Discussion' form (including optional poll) via the createDiscussion interface
Change the sort dropdown for discussions within the category
Submit the header search bar while viewing a category's discussions

access_methods.description: Accessed when a user navigates to category.html with a categorySlug query parameter, typically from the Categories overview or from a category label elsewhere

pages.name: Discussion Thread
pages.description: Detail page for a single discussion, showing the original post, replies, and interaction tools.
primary_functions: Display the original post, including title, body, tags, vote score, and any attached poll.
Show all replies in chronological or threaded order, including each replys author, content, and vote count.
Allow users to reply to the thread or to a specific reply (with and without @mentions) via inline reply editors.
Provide controls to upvote or like the original post and individual replies.
Offer thread-level actions such as subscribing/unsubscribing to notifications and bookmarking/saving the discussion.
Provide per-reply actions including 'Reply', 'Like', and 'Report/Flag', enabling spam reports with a spam reason and optional note.
Allow users to vote in an attached poll and see poll results, respecting settings like single-choice voting and 7-day duration.
Include breadcrumbs or a thread title link that returns the view to the top of the thread.

incoming_params.description: The Discussion.id for the thread to display; required for loading the original post, replies, tags, and poll

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a username or avatar for the original author or any reply author within the thread
Click on a tag such as 'CSS', 'Responsive Design', 'React', or 'Career Advice' displayed under the thread title
Submit the header search bar from within a discussion thread

access_methods.description: Reached by navigating to discussion.html with a discussionId parameter from listings such as Home, Categories, Search Results, Topics, Bookmarks, or a user's profile activity

pages.name: Search Results
pages.description: Search results page for queries entered in the header search bar.
primary_functions: Display a list of discussions matching a text query (e.g., 'javascript arrays', 'portfolio review', 'spam').
Provide a filter panel to narrow results by attributes such as date range (e.g., last 6 months) and minimum number of replies (e.g., at least 10).
Allow users to sort results by criteria such as relevance, newest, or 'Most Upvoted'.
Enable users to open any result discussion by clicking its title to go to the discussion thread page.

incoming_params.description: Full-text search query string entered in the header search bar, such as 'JavaScript arrays', 'portfolio review', or 'spam'
Optional filter representing the selected time range (e.g., 'last_6_months'), matching one of the dateRanges ids from getSearchFilterOptions
Optional minimum number of replies filter, such as 10 when the user chooses threads with at least 10 replies
Optional sort key like 'relevance', 'newest', or 'most_upvoted' selected in the sort dropdown
Optional page number for paginated search results

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a discussion title in the search results list
Apply new filters or sorting in the filter panel or sort dropdown

access_methods.description: Reached after submitting the header search bar, which redirects to search_results.html with the query parameter
Reloaded with updated query, filters, sort, or page parameters when the user adjusts filters or pagination

pages.name: Topics & Tags
pages.description: Exploration and management page for topics/tags, including following and viewing followed topics.
primary_functions: Provide a search field for topics/tags so users can search topics like 'ux design', 'react', or 'career advice'.
Display a list of matching topics with names and follower counts for each.
Allow users to follow or unfollow a topic directly from the list, ensuring they can choose topics with at least 500 followers.
Offer a 'Following' or 'My Topics' tab that lists all topics the user currently follows.
Enable navigation from a topic in the list or in 'My Topics' to its topic detail page (e.g., topic.html?topicId=ux_design).

incoming_params.description: Optional view selector such as 'explore' or 'following' to determine whether to show topic search or followed topics by default
Optional topic search term used for pre-filling and reloading the topic search results (e.g., 'UX Design', 'React', 'Career Advice')
Optional minimum follower count to filter topic search results, such as 500 when searching for high-interest topics

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a topic name in the search results or in the 'My Topics' / 'Following' list
Click on the 'Following' or 'My Topics' tab within the topics page
Submit the header search bar while on the topics page

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Topics' link in the global header navigation
Tab and search state can be restored by loading topics.html with tab, query, and minFollowers parameters

pages.name: Topic Detail
pages.description: Detail view for a single topic/tag, listing discussions associated with that topic.
primary_functions: Show the topic name, follower count, and basic description if available.
List recent or popular discussions tagged with this topic, allowing navigation to each discussion thread.
Allow users to follow or unfollow the topic from the topic detail page.
Provide breadcrumb or 'Back to My Topics' navigation that returns the user to the topics.html 'Following/My Topics' view.

incoming_params.description: The Tag.id for the topic being viewed, e.g., the id associated with 'UX Design', 'React', or 'Career Advice'
Optional sort key (e.g., 'latest', 'top') controlling ordering of discussions listed under this topic

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a discussion title within the topic's discussion list
Click the breadcrumb or 'Back to My Topics' link on the topic detail page
Submit the header search bar while viewing a topic detail page

access_methods.description: Accessed via topic links (tag chips) that navigate to topic.html with a tagId parameter from the Topics page or discussion tags

pages.name: Bookmarks
pages.description: Page where the user can view and manage their bookmarked discussions.
primary_functions: Display a list of all discussions the user has bookmarked or saved.
Allow users to open a bookmarked discussion thread by clicking its title.
Offer controls to remove a discussion from bookmarks if desired.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a bookmarked discussion title in the bookmarks list
Submit the header search bar while viewing the bookmarks page

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Bookmarks' link in the global header navigation
Accessible by entering bookmarks.html directly in the browser

pages.name: User Profile
pages.description: Public profile page for a user, accessed by clicking their username or avatar.
primary_functions: Show the users display name, bio/about text, and basic profile information.
Optionally list the users recent discussions or replies for context.
Provide a 'Message' or 'Send Private Message' button that opens the private messaging form (messages.html) pre-addressed to this user.

incoming_params.description: The MemberProfile.id of the user whose public profile should be displayed

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on the 'Message' or 'Send Private Message' button on the user profile page
Click on a discussion title in the user's recent discussions list
Click on a reply excerpt in the user's recent replies list
Submit the header search bar while viewing a user profile

access_methods.description: Accessed when clicking a username/avatar, which navigates to user_profile.html with memberProfileId in the query string

pages.name: Messages
pages.description: Private messaging center used to compose and send direct messages to other users.
primary_functions: Provide a message composition form with fields for recipient (pre-filled when arriving from a user profile), subject, and message body.
Allow users to write and send private messages such as a 35 sentence request for portfolio feedback without external links.
Optionally display a list of existing message threads or sent messages for reference.

incoming_params.description: Optional MemberProfile.id to pre-fill the recipient field when composing a private message from a user's profile
Optional page number for paginated sent messages list

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on the recipient's name or avatar in the sent messages list
Submit the header search bar while in the messaging center

access_methods.description: Accessible via a 'Messages' item in the signed-in user's menu
Recipient can be pre-set by opening messages.html with a recipientProfileId parameter from a user's profile page

pages.name: User Settings
pages.description: Account and profile settings page for managing personal information and preferences.
primary_functions: Allow users to update their display name (e.g., to 'Alex UX Researcher').
Provide a bio or 'About Me' text area where users can enter a 2030 word description of their UX research work and interests.
Offer localization or preferences controls including a timezone dropdown to select options like 'GMT+1' or 'UTC+1'.
Include notification settings such as a toggle or checkbox to enable 'Daily summary' or 'Daily email digest'.
Provide a 'Save Changes' or 'Update Profile' action that applies all updated profile and preference settings.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit the header search bar while viewing the settings page

access_methods.description: Accessible via a 'Settings' or 'Profile Settings' option in the signed-in user's menu

pages.name: About
pages.description: Information about the community and the forum platform.
primary_functions: Describe the purpose and goals of the discussion community.
Provide background information about the forum maintainers or organization and link to help or contact resources.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'Get Help' or 'Support' link within the About content
Submit the header search bar while on the About page

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'About' link in the global footer navigation
Accessible by entering about.html directly in the browser

pages.name: Help & Support
pages.description: Help center containing guidance on how to use the forums main features.
primary_functions: Offer help articles or FAQs covering actions like creating discussions, replying, following topics, bookmarking threads, and reporting spam.
Provide guidance on using filters and search to find relevant discussions.
Link to any available support or feedback channels for additional assistance.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a contextual link in help content that guides users to browse discussion categories
Submit the header search bar from the Help & Support page

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Help' link in the global header navigation
Accessible via the 'Help' link in the global footer navigation
Accessible by entering help.html directly in the browser

pages.name: Terms of Service
pages.description: Legal terms governing use of the discussion forum.
primary_functions: Present the terms and conditions that users agree to when using the site.
Outline acceptable use policies and rules for participation in discussions.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a reference link from the terms page to the privacy policy

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Terms' link in the global footer navigation
Accessible by entering terms.html directly in the browser

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Information about data handling and privacy practices.
primary_functions: Explain how user data, content, and personal information are collected, stored, and used.
Provide details on cookies, tracking, and users privacy-related choices or rights.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a reference link from the privacy policy back to the terms of service

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Privacy' link in the global footer navigation
Accessible by entering privacy.html directly in the browser

header_links.description: Forum homepage with trending, popular, and recent discussions
Browse all discussion categories such as Web Development and Product Feedback
Explore, search, and follow discussion topics and tags
View and open your bookmarked or saved discussions
Read help articles and FAQs about using the forum

footer_links.description: Learn more about this community and platform
Get help and support for using the forum
Read the terms of service for using the site
Review the privacy policy and data practices
